message:
refactor: add type aliases and cleanup redundant Default implementations

Improves code readability with type aliases for shared state handles and removes
duplicate Default implementation that's now covered by derive macro.

Changes:
• Added SharedWorld and SharedStorageArc type aliases in main.rs
• Fixed run_demo() to receive both world and storage parameters
• Removed manual Default impl for ActivationKind (uses derive)

Type aliases improve clarity:
```rust
type SharedWorld = Arc<Mutex<WorldState>>;
type SharedStorageArc = Arc<Mutex<Storage>>;
```

Small refactoring to support HUD dashboard integration.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
